name: adops-xray
description: Developer-first ad diagnostics Chrome extension for auditing live ad iframe behavior.

scripts.validate:js: node --check src/core/constants.js && node --check src/core/detector.js && node --check src/core/scanner.js && node --check src/ui/popup/popup.js && node --check src/ui/popup/renderer.js
scripts.validate: npm run validate:manifest && npm run validate:js
